[Home](https://www.enventure.com/) [About Us](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/) Leadership Team

# Leadership Team

## Anil Sivadas, Chairman and CEO

Anil is a visionary leader, with over 32 years of management experience in the high-tech sector. He has consistently guided the company with his exceptional aptitude for innovation and strategic direction.

Prior to Enventure, Anil was a senior management executive with a Billion Dollar consumer electronics company, where he garnered many years of experience in Manufacturing, R&D, and Sales. He holds a Bachelor’s degree in Electronics Engineering and a Master’s degree in Business Administration. Always an ardent proponent of high standards of customer satisfaction, he is also a certified Net Promoter Associate and coaches the Enventure team on the NPS system.

He enjoys traveling, listening to music and is a movie buff.

[![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogo.png)](https://in.linkedin.com/in/anil-sivadas-a48643)

![Anil Sivada](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/anil_sivdas-768x768.jpg)

![Kiran Sivadas](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/kiran_sivdas-768x768.jpg)

## Kiran Sivadas, Executive Vice President

Kiran brings to Enventure a wealth of knowledge in executive management, expanding markets, innovative solutions and building & managing a customer base. Since Enventure’s inception, he has fueled the company’s growth by introducing innovative services, developing go-to-market strategies and expanding Enventure’s global footprint – all of which has contributed to Enventure’s success in various business areas and markets.

Kiran drives Enventure’s strategic business growth initiatives, and leads a team that has enabled Enventure to establish a global footprint across North America, Europe and Asia-Pacific. He holds a Master’s degree in Business Administration, with specialization in Sales and Marketing.

His interests include music, travel and photography.

[![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogoo.png)](https://in.linkedin.com/in/kiransivadas)

## Peter Mathew, Chief Financial Officer

Peter heads Finance and Accounts at Enventure, which includes ensuring statutory compliance and managing the financial health of the company. He is an expert in international trade, foreign exchange management and budget control and has played a key role at Enventure in these areas, since 2006. He holds an MBA in Finance and has over 25 years of experience in financial management across different industries. Apart from the core finance function, Peter also manages the legal review function and general administration of the company.

Prior to joining Enventure, Peter was working in the Middle East, where he gained valuable experience in accounting and finance dealing, with international clients and partners.

He follows basketball very closely and also loves reading.

[![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogo.png)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/peter-enventure-bangalore-52a11a18)

![Peter Mathew](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/peter-mathew-768x768.jpg)

![Wilfred Fernandes](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/Wilfred-1.png)

## Wilfred Fernandes, Chief Process Officer

Wilfred is an industry leader with more than 34 years of diverse experience. He holds a degree in Engineering and a degree from IIM, Bangalore. He has been associated with BPL Soft Energy Systems Ltd & BPL Ltd and has also steered Enventure Engineering LLP as its Managing Director earlier.

He has an incredible ability to compartmentalize complex processes and is constantly finding ways to help improve efficiencies, save time and reduce aggravation.

His expertise lies in Quality Management, Business Development & Management, Customer Orientation & Leadership, Manufacturing, R&D, Engineering and Supply Chain Management to name a few.

[![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogoo.png)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/wilfred-fernandes-2a4b875/)

## CK Bharathan, Director – Global Delivery

CK Bharathan (“CK”) heads operations at Enventure for three key service lines : Engineering Services, Master Data Management (MDM), and Regulatory Compliance (ComplianceXL). Over the past 28 years, CK has worked in different industries, covering multiple functional areas ranging from manufacturing and engineering to technical services and supply chain management.
A detail-oriented person, CK has an excellent cultural understanding of how global programs are managed effectively while operationally managing costs and optimizing resource utilization. He is a Six Sigma Green Belt and has thorough knowledge and implementation experience in ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 13485, and OHSAS 18001. CK is also an expert in SPC, 5S, and Kaizen. He has led initiatives to implement ERP programs in large organizations.
CK is an engineering graduate and loves books and music.

[![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogo.png)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ck-bharathan-11360518)

![CK Bharathan](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/CK.jpg)

![Girish Shetty](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Girish.jpg)

## Girish Shetty, SVP – Engineering Services

Girish holds the responsibility for managing global engineering operations and delivery at Enventure. He has over 20 years of experience in Engineering Design & Development, across large corporations such as HCL Technologies, Carrier Corporation and Manitowoc Cranes GmbH.

Girish has very strong organizational and people management skills, which enables him to run an efficient team of engineers at Enventure. He is highly customer focused and is admired by his team as well as clients, for his ability to manage multiple projects and priorities seamlessly. He is also an expert in multiple Engineering, CAD and PLM platforms from world leaders such as PTC, Dassault Systèmes, Autodesk and Ansys.

He is a Mechanical Engineer and his major hobbies include cricket and travel.

[![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogoo.png)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/girish-babu-shetty-5934a012b)

## Nikhil Anil Sivadas, Vice President

Nikhil Anil Sivadas is a versatile professional with a strong foundation in mechanical engineering and finance. After earning his engineering degree, Nikhil further advanced his expertise by studying finance at the prestigious London Business School, equipping him with strategic financial insights to complement his technical background. As the Vice President at Enventure Engineering, Nikhil plays a pivotal role in driving operational efficiency, innovation, and strategic growth. His expertise in both engineering and finance allows him to optimize processes, enhance project delivery, and ensure client success. Nikhil is deeply focused on building strong, lasting client relationships by aligning technical and financial strategies with client goals, ensuring the delivery of high-value solutions and exceptional service.

[![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogo.png)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nikhil-anil-sivadas-29592743/)

![Nikhil Anil Sivadas](https://www.enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/Image.jpg)

![Jerry vaidyan](https://www.enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/Jerry-Koshy.png)

## Jerry Koshy Vaidyan, General Manager – HCM

Jerry heads Human Resources at Enventure. He has a keen interest in organizational and individual behaviour and believes that the sole aim of organizations is to serve customers, the twin aims of businesses are profitability and growth and it is people who drive all three sustainably. He channels over two decades of experience spanning Marine Engineering, Engineering Services and EPC organizations into enabling people success at Enventure through organizational capability building and problem solving.

He is a Mechanical Engineer with a PGDM from TAPMI, Manipal. His interests range from books at the intersection of applied Philosophy, Psychology and Neuroscience to long drives and treks to helping people succeed in their roles and endeavours.

[![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogoo.png)](https://in.linkedin.com/in/jerry-vaidyan-39677a31/)

## Sushil Kurian, Vice President – Customer Success

Sushil heads Customer Success and Key Account Management roles for Enventure. Sushil brings in over 34 years of corporate experience in Delivery Management, Quality Management, Account management, Business Development.
An experienced and highly organized individual who provides strategic direction and management coverage to the organization, Sushil believes in result-oriented leadership.He is known to build highly motivated teams that are conscious of improving productivity and quality throughout the business function.Creating a data and results-driven environment that enables continuous improvement to thrive consistently, reduce waste, cost of non-quality, he is passionate about creating a culture of Right First Time. This is proven to enable higher levels of customer satisfaction.

A positive approach to all tasks and Sushil’s ability to form good relationships with customers, peers and staff is central to his success.

![linkedin](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/linkedinlogo.png)

![Sushil Kurian](https://www.enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/Sushil-Kurian.png)

[+1 (312) 755 3971](tel:+13127553971)

[info@enventure.com](mailto:info@enventure.com?subject=Enventure%20Website%20Inquiry)
